rationale: The "fail with a crashing bus" hook is rooted in puzzle/parking/draw-line gameplay and has zero overlap with Flappy Dunk's tap-to-fly hoop loop — there are no vehicles, no cursor-drag mechanic, and no level-fail moment to misrepresent honestly. Palette (white/green/red) and the cursor-driven visual language also clash with the game's bold magenta/beige 2D cartoon VS aesthetic. Audience (hypercasual fail-bait viewers) does broadly overlap, but adapting this archetype would require a full re-skin to a "tap-and-miss-the-hoop" fail concept, at which point it's no longer this cluster — recommend skipping.
